text: UAE e-invoicing goes voluntary July 1 with mandatory rollout from January 2027

UAE large enterprises must adopt e-invoicing by January 1 2027
DFSA crypto token regulatory framework updated effective January 12 2026
UAE CMA established under Federal Decree-Law No 32 of 2025
Gulf AML enforcement intensifies with larger fines and license revocations
SAMA replaces 2021 payments framework with updated oversight regulations March 2026
UAE open finance services now require CBUAE licensing under new law
VARA virtual asset regulatory framework remains comprehensive benchmark for UAE market
UAE SMEs under 50 million dirhams must comply with e-invoicing by July 2027
